title: Elementoes RPG 2: Fartstanktopia
description: Quest around a vast world with friends, explore dungeons, create machines, and fight bosses
body:
Elementoes RPG 2: Fartstanktopia
ER2F is an exploration based kitchen sink pack, explore dungeons, fight bosses, and build with friends as you survive!

This pack uses Better Combat, Mediumcore, Hunger Strike, and more to change the way you play by encouraging teamplay, more engaging combat, and overall provide a new experience compared to vanilla! 

External Mods:
[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) by LainMI (Version cosmeticarmorreworked-1.20.1-v1a)
